title: Ability to filter users based on department
excerpt: We have many departments within our organization. We use locked boards to ensure relevant people within each department have access.  However every-time, we have to search people by their name to add. It would be nice to…

posts.author: MACMonday (Meena Barve)
posts.cookedHtml: We have many departments within our organization. We use locked boards to ensure relevant people within each department have access. However every-time, we have to search people by their name to add. It would be nice to filter all users by department or ‘User Group’ and assign to all related boards.

posts.author: BenV (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Meena,

You can make a group of users with the Teams feature and then you just invite the entire team to a board rather than individual users: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005884405-All-about-teams

I ran into the same issue with micromanaging individual users’ board access, and it’s way less hassle after organizing our users into teams.

Hopefully that helps!

Ben
